{"query":"Imran Chaudhri Bethany Bongiorno HP Humane acquisition employment status 2025","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1463,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://techcrunch.com/2025/02/20/inside-the-humane-acquisition-hp-offers-big-raises-to-some-others-immediately-laid-off/","title":"Inside the Humane acquisition: HP offers big raises to some, others immediately laid off | TechCrunch","content":"Humane, formerly one of Silicon Valley’s buzziest AI hardware startups, announced on Tuesday it was being partially acquired by HP for $116 million, which is less than half of the $240 million the startup raised in venture capital funding.
Hours after the acquisition was announced, several Humane employees received job offers from HP with pay increases between 30% and 70%, plus HP stock and bonus plans, the sources revealed.
The new unit will focus on integrating artificial intelligence into HP’s personal computers, printers, and connected conference rooms.
The New York Times reported in June that Humane wanted to sell itself to HP for more than $1 billion, though the final price ended up being far less.
After the acquisition was announced, Humane told customers they should “recycle” their $499 Ai Pins, which the startup says will mostly stop working in less than two weeks.
Previously with Gizmodo, Bloomberg, and MSNBC, Zeff has covered the rise of AI and the Silicon Valley Bank crisis."},{"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/in/imran-chaudhri","title":"Imran Chaudhri - HP IQ | LinkedIn","content":"Learn more in our Cookie Policy.
Excited to share Kindred Ventures led Hydra Host’s $100m Series A alongside NVIDIA, with participation from Founders Fund, ARK Investment Management…"},{"url":"https://daringfireball.net/linked/2025/02/18/hp-buys-humane","title":"Daring Fireball: We Found the Sucker Willing to Buy Humane, and as Promised, I'm Going to Be Insufferable, Because of Course It Was HP","content":"Chaudhri and Bongiorno were design and software engineers at Apple Inc. before founding the startup.
But they were dumb enough to bring into their company Chaudhri, who was described to me, by someone who worked with him at Apple (and a person whom I’ve never heard badmouth a single other former colleague), as “an utter fraud”.
★ Tuesday, 18 February 2025"},{"url":"https://medium.com/@Aaron0928/the-first-star-ai-hardware-becomes-e-waste-in-just-10-days-de1b4b85a7e1","title":"Medium","content":"HP will acquire the startup’s intellectual property for $116 million, but apparently isn’t interested in its hardware.
Back in June of last year, the New York Times reported that Humane was looking for a buyout and mentioned HP as one of the potential acquirers."},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Humane_Inc.","title":"Humane Inc. - Wikipedia","content":"Humane was founded by Imran Chaudhri and Bethany Bongiorno in 2018; the couple previously worked at Apple Inc.
By November 2023, the company had raised $230 million, with notable investors such as Marc Benioff, Sam Altman, Tiger Global, Solstice, SoftBank, Qualcomm, Microsoft, LG, Volvo, and Salesforce.
In February 2025, it was announced that HP would acquire most of Humane Inc. for $116 million.
Humane’s team, including founders Imran Chaudhri and Bethany Bongiorno, will join HP to help integrate AI into HP’s products on the newly formed HP IQ team.
Chaudhri revealed the device and demonstrated its features during a TED Talk in May 2023, and it was later showcased at Paris Fashion Week in September.
Humane announced the device's name in July 2023.
It was reported that between May and August, more Ai Pins were returned than purchased.
In February 2025, Humane announced it had stopped selling the AI Pin and existing devices would no longer connect to the company’s servers after 12:00 AM San Francisco time on February 28."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Imran Chaudhri Bethany Bongiorno HP Humane acquisition employment status 2025","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Humane_Inc.","title":"Humane Inc.","content":"**Humane Inc.** (stylized as **hu.ma.ne**) was an American consumer electronics company founded in 2018 by Imran Chaudhri and Bethany Bongiorno. The company designed and developed the AI Pin, a wearable voice-operated virtual assistant device, which started shipping in April 2024 but received poor reviews. Humane was founded by Imran Chaudhri and Bethany Bongiorno in 2018; the couple previously worked at Apple Inc. The startup emerged from stealth mode in 2021. Some 200 people were hired to work for the company, with 40% of them having spent time working at Apple Inc. The company stated that it has raised $100 million in both of its Series B and C rounds. In February 2025, it was announced that HP would acquire most of Humane Inc. for $116 million. The deal includes the majority of Humane's employees, software platform, and intellectual property, including the AI Pin's CosmOS operating system and over 300 patents and patent applications, but excludes the AI Pin device business itself, which will be discontinued.","score":0.8652358,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://techcrunch.com/2025/02/20/inside-the-humane-acquisition-hp-offers-big-raises-to-some-others-immediately-laid-off","title":"Inside the Humane acquisition: HP offers big raises to some, others immediately laid off | TechCrunch","content":"Humane, formerly one of Silicon Valley’s buzziest AI hardware startups, announced on Tuesday it was being partially acquired by HP for $116 million, which is less than half of the $240 million the startup raised in venture capital funding. Tuesday may not have been a great day for some Humane investors, but it was especially chaotic for its roughly 200 employees, according to internal documents seen by TechCrunch and two sources who requested anonymity to discuss private matters. Multiple employees who received offers worked on the company’s core software, though sources also indicated that not all of the people who worked on software got job offers. The companies announced on Tuesday that a newly formed innovation lab at HP — HP IQ — will not only be home to Humane’s co-founders, Imran Chaudhri and CEO Bethany Bongiorno, but also the startup’s AI operating system, CosmOS.","score":0.8156003,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://inngot.com/news-views/humane-wearable-ai-pin-killed-as-hp-acquires-key-ai-ip-and-assets-for-116m","title":"Humane wearable AI pin killed as HP acquires key AI IP ...","content":"Imran Chaudhri and Bethany Bongiorno, ended on February 28th, 2025, staff in non-AI related areas have been let go. Imran Chaudhri and CEO","score":0.8145405,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Imran_Chaudhri","title":"Imran Chaudhri - Wikipedia","content":"**Imran Chaudhri** is a designer and founder of Humane Inc., a company created with his wife, Bethany Bongiorno. He created user interface and interaction designs for Apple products from 1995 to 2017. Chaudhri was part of the design team that made the original iPhone interface. Chaudhri was fired by Apple in 2017, a month before he was expected to leave, after sending a departure email. He formed his own technology company, Humane with his wife Bethany, who he met while they both were working on the iPad. In 2025, HP acquired most of the Humane company, along with Chaudhri, who will lead a new team to integrate AI features into HP products. 1. 1 2 \"The iPad's original software designer and program lead look back on the device's first 10 years\". 3. ↑ Brian Merchant, \"What is the iPhone? \"The iPhone's original UI designer on Apple's greatest flaws\". 6. ↑ Brian Merchant, \"The Secret Origin Story of the iPhone,\" *The Verge*, June 13, 2017.","score":0.7906115,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/posts/bethany-bongiorno-55a20779_next-isnt-your-typical-recruiting-event-activity-7354644000252837888-qV5M","title":"NEXT isn’t your typical recruiting event. It’s a bold, thoughtful initiative designed to connect exceptional executive talent with HP's senior leaders through candid conversations around leadership… | Bethany Bongiorno | 19 comments","content":"It’s a bold, thoughtful initiative designed to connect exceptional executive talent with HP's senior leaders through candid conversations around leadership, innovation, and the future of technology. Now, as SVPs leading HP IQ, we’re excited to help shape HP’s AI strategy and assist in the transformation of HP into an experience-led company. You brought together a remarkable group of leaders and created a space for connection and inspired dialogue. HP IQ is such a critical part of HPs continued evolution and growth. It was truly an inspiring event and I appreciated HP's effort to bring a local talent community together. Such a great event all around — I didn’t get to join the breakout, but was truly inspired by the conversations throughout.","score":0.42907107,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.26,"request_id":"dea40b87-cd18-4174-988b-26704642ccac"}
